name: goat-india-ecommerce
description: Full-stack e-commerce application with React frontend and Node.js backend

scripts.build: npm run install-all && npm run build-frontend
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.heroku-postbuild: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
